methods.description: Process for collecting and classifying specimens from the late Miocene limestone in the Western Romagna Apennines, with a focus on the preservation and classification of the specimens.

steps.description: The studied sample has been collected near Cò di Sasso into the 'Parco regionale della Vena del Gesso romagnola', located in Western Romagna Apennines (Ravenna, Emilia-Romagna, N Italy), from pre-evaporitic limestone assigned to the late Miocene (early-middle Messinian).
steps.searchable_summary: collect specimens from late Miocene limestone in Western Romagna Apennines

steps.description: The specimens are mainly preserved as three-dimensional moulds of the interior, due to the dissolution of the original exoskeleton, or simply as external casts.
steps.searchable_summary: process specimens to identify preservation state

steps.description: The specimens, with the exception of M. bortolottii, have been assigned to species already reported from the Italian Miocene.
steps.searchable_summary: assign specimens to known species from Italian Miocene

steps.description: For the higher-level classification, we follow the recent arrangement proposed by Ng et al. (2008), De Grave et al. (2009), and Karasawa et al. (2014).
steps.searchable_summary: classify specimens using recent taxonomic arrangements
